events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Michael Philip Jagger, lead singer of The Rolling Stones, was born on this day in Dartford, Kent.

angles.name: Mick Jagger's Birthday
angles.copy: Still rocking stadiums worldwide, Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday today. What's your favourite Stones track that gets you moving like Jagger?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' "Video Killed The Radio Star" being the very first music video ever broadcast.

angles.name: MTV Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV changed music forever by launching with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony isn't lost on us, but what an impact it made on artists and fans alike.

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' in 1994, which became the fastest-selling debut album in British history at the time.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and kickstarted a Britpop revolution. Which track from the album still sounds absolutely biblical to you?

events.title: Woodstock Festival: 57 years on
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, began on this day in 1969 in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. What an incredible moment in time.

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley
events.blurb: The music world remembers Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977, leaving behind an unparalleled legacy as the King of Rock and Roll.

angles.name: Elvis Anniversary
angles.copy: 49 years ago today, we lost the King. Elvis Presley's music and charisma continue to captivate generations. What's your go-to Elvis track?

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur
events.blurb: The music world remembers the tragic events surrounding Tupac Shakur, who was shot in Las Vegas in 1996, a week before his passing.

angles.name: Tupac Anniversary
angles.copy: 30 years since the tragic shooting of Tupac Shakur. His impact on hip-hop and culture remains immense. What's a track that truly showcases his genius?

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: The music world remembers Jimi Hendrix, one of the most influential guitarists in history, who passed away in 1970.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Anniversary
angles.copy: 56 years ago, we lost a true guitar visionary. Jimi Hendrix's legacy continues to inspire musicians across the globe. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album in 1969, featuring its legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most recognisable in history. What's your standout track?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, lead singer of The Pretenders, was born on this day in Akron, Ohio.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde. Her distinctive voice and punk-rock attitude have made The Pretenders timeless. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, the iconic frontman of Oasis and a distinctive voice in British rock, was born on this day in Manchester.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher's Birthday
angles.copy: The one and only Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday today. Still sounding biblical, what's your favourite Liam moment, musical or otherwise?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 51
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the UK in 1975, carrying a timeless message of peace and unity.

angles.name: Imagine Anniversary
angles.copy: 51 years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' was released in the UK. Its message of peace and hope is as relevant today as it ever was. What does the song mean to you?

events.title: The first iPod launched 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple introduced the first-generation iPod in 2001, revolutionising how people listened to music on the go.

angles.name: iPod Launch Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember the day your music collection fit in your pocket? The first iPod was launched 25 years ago, changing the game for portable music forever.

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: Global James Bond Day celebrates the premiere of the first James Bond film, 'Dr. No', on this day in London in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day Celebration
angles.copy: Grab your martini, shaken not stirred! It's James Bond Day, celebrating over six decades of 007. Who's your favourite Bond and why?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The world remembers John Lennon, the legendary co-founder of The Beatles and peace activist, who was born on this day in Liverpool in 1940.

angles.name: John Lennon's Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: John Lennon would have been 86 today. His music and message of peace continue to resonate globally. What's a Lennon lyric that stays with you?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, was born on this day in Somerset.

angles.name: John Cleese's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, his comedic genius is unparalleled. What's your favourite Cleese moment?

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' turns 58
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, famously known as 'The White Album', in 1968, showcasing their diverse musical directions.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: 58 years ago, The Beatles unleashed 'The White Album' – a sprawling, experimental masterpiece. Which track from this legendary double album is your absolute favourite?
